title: Longest Palindromic Substring
coreIdea: Find the longest palindromic substring by treating each character (and each gap between characters, for even-length palindromes) as a potential center, expanding outward while characters match on both sides.
recognitionCues: asks for longest palindromic substring (contiguous), not subsequence
brute force is O(n^3), problem hints at O(n^2) improvement
approach: For each index, run two expansions: one treating the index as a single center (odd length), one treating index and index+1 as a center pair (even length). Expand outward while left and right characters match, tracking the longest palindrome found across all centers.
